exam_info.title: Comprehensive Examination - Sample Test
exam_info.description: This is a sample exam for testing purposes. Contains all question types.

questions.text: What is the capital city of South Korea?
Which programming language is known for its use in data science and machine learning?
Who painted the Mona Lisa?
What is the chemical symbol for Gold?
Which planet is known as the 'Red Planet'?
The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
Shakespeare wrote 'Pride and Prejudice'.
The human body has four lungs.
Mount Everest is the tallest mountain on Earth.
The process by which plants make their own food using sunlight is called __________.
__________ is the largest ocean on Earth, covering about 30% of the planet's surface.
The author of 'Harry Potter' is __________ __________.
What is the Pythagorean theorem? Write the formula.
Name three countries that are part of the European Union.
questions.answer: France, Germany, Italy (any three EU members)

questions.text: What does CPU stand for in computing?
Discuss the causes and effects of climate change. Provide at least three causes and three effects.
questions.answer: Essay should include: Causes - greenhouse gas emissions, deforestation, fossil fuels; Effects - rising sea levels, extreme weather, biodiversity loss

questions.text: Explain the importance of the Industrial Revolution and how it changed society.
questions.answer: Essay should discuss: technological innovations, urbanization, labor conditions, economic systems

questions.text: Match each country with its capital city.
Match each famous scientist with their major contribution.
Arrange the following events in chronological order (earliest to latest).
questions.answer: American Independence, French Revolution, World War I, Moon Landing, Fall of Berlin Wall

questions.text: Order the following planets by distance from the Sun (closest to farthest).
Write a Python function that checks if a number is prime. The function should return True for prime numbers and False otherwise.
Solve the following equation for x: 3x + 7 = 22
Calculate the area of a circle with radius 5 cm. Use π = 3.14.
